hero.title: 1st Tomasino Agroecological Gathering
hero.subtitle: Sign up for the first agroecological gathering in Santo Tomás

intro.body: A community gathering to share knowledge on agroecology, composting, seeds, and local production.

basic.title: Basic information
basic.description: We need this information to contact you and organize the gathering.

participation.title: How you’ll take part
participation.description: How would you like to participate? You can select more than one option.

interests.title: Interests
interests.description: What would you like to do at the gathering? Check all that apply.

checkboxes.worksInOrg: I work for an organization or institution
checkboxes.interestedAgroecology: I want to learn about agroecology
checkboxes.consent: I agree that my information may be used to organize this gathering and future agroecological events.

phase1.phone: Please enter your phone or WhatsApp.
phase1.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
phase1.community: Please enter your municipality or community.

submit.consent_given: You must accept the use of your information to register.

errors.genericSubmit: Could not submit. Please try again.

success.title: Thank you for registering!
success.body: See you at the 1st Tomasino Agroecological Gathering.
